forksync_v1.source: SYNC_REPORT.md — v1 run, last recorded run

forksync_v2.source: Cloud Run logs — v2 does not yet write SYNC_REPORT.md
forksync_v2.note: v2 rebuilt from scratch — gh repo sync, asyncio.Semaphore(50), Cloud Run + Redis + VPC

decisions.why_v2_rebuilt: merge-upstream REST API silently failed — forks appeared synced but were not. Replaced with gh repo sync which is verified by GitHub CLI.
decisions.why_cloud_run: GitHub Actions timeout at 6 minutes could not support 13 minute v1 runtime. Cloud Run with 900s timeout and streaming response solves this.
decisions.why_redis: Compare API calls were returning stale data across runs. Redis caching with ETag support reduces redundant API calls and improves speed.
decisions.why_graphql: REST API required 818 individual calls to fetch fork metadata. GraphQL batch fetch does it in 9 calls.
